scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, baseUri) propagates runtime exception from custom TreeBuilder.parse and unlocks for subsequent calls
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub TreeBuilder whose parse(...) throws IllegalStateException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalStateException is thrown on each call, and lock is not held between calls
pseudocode: // Arrange stub TreeBuilder that always throws
public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { throw new IllegalStateException("boom"); }
public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element c, String u, Parser p) { return null; }
// Act second call to confirm unlock

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, baseUri) propagates runtime exception from stub HtmlTreeBuilder.parse and unlocks for subsequent calls
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub HtmlTreeBuilder whose parse(...) throws IllegalArgumentException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalArgumentException is thrown on each call, lock is released between calls
pseudocode: // Arrange stub HtmlTreeBuilder that always throws
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { throw new IllegalArgumentException("fail"); }
// Act second call to confirm unlock
